results.rendered_html:
1. kauśalya (von kuśala) n. gaṇa brāhmaṇādi zu  P. 5,1,124 .
1〉 Wohlfahrt, Wohlergehen: pṛṣṭvā kauśalyamanyo'nyam  MBH. 3,15009 . kuśalī rāmaḥ sa tvāṃ kauśalyamabravīt  R. 5,31,26 . 54 . 55 . 6,109,58 .
— 2〉 Geschicklichkeit, Erfahrenheit: upāyakauśalyaṃ prayojayet  SADDH. P. 4,18,a .
— Vgl. kauśala.
